name: aiir
description: Tamper-evident receipts for commits with declared AI involvement. Detects AI-involvement signals, produces content-addressed JSON receipts, and provides cryptographic audit trails for compliance.

tools.name: aiir_receipt
tools.description: Generate a cryptographic receipt for git commits in the current repository. Detects AI authorship signals (Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, etc.) and produces a content-addressed JSON receipt for audit trails.

commit.description: Specific commit SHA to receipt. Default: HEAD.

ai_only.description: Only receipt commits detected as AI-authored.

pretty.description: Return human-readable summary instead of raw JSON.

redact_files.description: Omit individual file paths from receipts (privacy).

tools.name: aiir_verify
tools.description: Verify the integrity of an AIIR receipt file. Checks that content_hash and receipt_id are valid — any modification invalidates the receipt.

file.description: Relative path to the receipt JSON file to verify.

tools.name: aiir_stats
tools.description: Show statistics for the AIIR receipt ledger. Returns receipt count, AI-authored percentage, unique authors, and date range.

tools.name: aiir_explain
tools.description: Provide a human-readable explanation of a receipt verification result. Designed for non-cryptography users.

file.description: Relative path to the receipt JSON file to explain.

tools.name: aiir_policy_check
tools.description: Check the current AIIR ledger against policy constraints. Evaluates AI-authored commit percentage against a configurable threshold.

max_ai_percent.description: Maximum allowed AI-authored commit percentage (0-100). Default: 50.

tools.name: aiir_verify_release
tools.description: Verify a release by evaluating AIIR receipts against a named policy. Produces a Verification Summary Attestation (VSA) with pass/fail decision, coverage statistics, and policy evaluation details. Use this for CI gates, audit trails, and compliance checks.

commit_range.description: Git commit range to verify (e.g., 'origin/main..HEAD'). If omitted, all receipts in the ledger are evaluated.

policy.description: Policy preset name ('strict', 'balanced', 'permissive') or path to a policy JSON file. Default: balanced.

emit_intoto.description: If true, wrap the result as an in-toto Statement v1 Verification Summary Attestation.

tools.name: aiir_gitlab_summary
tools.description: Generate a GitLab-flavored Markdown summary of AIIR receipts. Returns a formatted table with AI authorship breakdown, per-commit details, and optional SAST report data. Designed for GitLab Duo Chat, MR comments, and CI pipelines.

range.description: Commit range to summarize (e.g., 'origin/main..HEAD'). If omitted, all receipts are summarized.

include_sast.description: Include SAST report data (Security Dashboard format) alongside the Markdown summary.

post_to_mr.description: Post the summary as a comment on the current merge request. Only works inside GitLab CI with CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID set.
